footer.tagline: Made-to-measure womenswear, cut one piece at a time in {{location}}.

meta.description: Made-to-measure womenswear, cut to you in Accra. Browse limited, themed collections and have each piece made to your measurements.

currentDrop.noteFallback: A limited run cut only after an order is placed. When the fabric is gone, this collection retires.
currentDrop.fabricTitle: Made until the cloth says stop.

collections.title: Named, limited runs.
collections.empty: New collections are on the way.

choose.title: Choose a design
choose.body: Browse the live collections, each priced in Ghana Cedis.

measured.title: Measured your way
measured.body: A standard band, your own measurements, or a home visit.

delivered.title: Cut & delivered
delivered.body: Made to order, tracked, then dispatched or picked up.

newIn.title: Fresh off the table.
newIn.empty: New designs are on the way.

waitlist.title: Be the first to know.
waitlist.body: One note when a new collection drops. Limited runs sell through.

error.title: The store is catching its breath.

store.documentDescription: Browse Eight Two Five's limited, themed collections and made-to-measure designs, cut to order in Accra.
store.bannerDescription: Live collections and limited runs, cut to order. Browse the themed collections below, or search every design that's currently open.
store.collectionsEmptyTitle: The first collection is on the cutting table.
store.collectionsEmptyBody: Collections are limited and themed — around ten designs each. The first one hasn't dropped yet; join the list on the homepage and we'll write the moment it does.
store.noMatchBody: Try a shorter word — design names are short — or clear the search to see everything that's live.
store.designsEmptyBody: The live designs will appear here shortly. In the meantime, the collections above show what's coming.

collection.retiredBody: Every collection is a limited run — when the fabric is gone, it's gone. The live collections are still open in the store.
collection.emptyBody: This collection is live but its designs are still being photographed. Check back shortly.

measurementForm.helper: Enter your measurements in centimetres — the atelier confirms the final fit with you before cutting.

delivery.areaHelperRates: Pick a listed area for a set rate, or type your own — we'll arrange delivery.
delivery.areaHelperNoRates: Enter your area; delivery will be arranged directly if no rate is set.

customer.name: Full name
customer.phoneError: Enter a Ghana number like 024 123 4567 or +233 24 123 4567.
customer.phoneHelper: Mobile or landline — e.g. 024 123 4567. We reach you here and on WhatsApp.

errors.name: Please enter your full name.
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid Ghana phone number, e.g. 024 123 4567.

detail.customQuoteNotice: Custom requests are quoted directly — no price shown until the merchant replies.
detail.chartPending: The chart for this band is being finalised — every piece is still cut to your measurements.
detail.pricingPending: Pricing for this design is being finalised.

customSize.homeVisitHelper: Choose an open slot and pay a deposit that counts toward your garment.
customSize.workplaceHelper: Visit the Eight Two Five workspace — no booking or deposit needed.

confirmation.received: Request received — reference {{ref}}. We've emailed a sign-in link to {{email}} so you can track it; the atelier will follow up with a quote.

footnote.custom: You will receive a quote by email and in your account before any payment.
footnote.standard: Payment confirms your order and books it into production.

related.heading: More from this run.
related.body: Same fabric story, different cut. Every piece is made only when ordered.

retired.title: This design has been retired
retired.body: Each design lives only as long as its fabric. This one has sold through — the live designs are waiting in the store.

about.documentDescription: Eight Two Five makes made-to-measure womenswear in limited, themed collections, cut one garment at a time in Accra.
about.bannerDescription: A small atelier making made-to-measure womenswear in limited, themed collections — nothing mass-produced, nothing left on a shelf.
about.storyBody: Eight Two Five makes made-to-measure womenswear in limited, themed collections. Nothing is mass-produced and nothing sits on a shelf — every piece is cut after you order it, to your measurements, and retired when its fabric runs out.
about.craftAtelierBody: A small Accra workroom where every garment is cut one at a time. No racks, no leftover stock — a design exists only when someone orders it.
about.craftFabricBody: Each collection is built around a limited bolt of fabric. Around ten designs share it; when the bolt runs out, the collection retires for good.

fit.documentDescription: Choose a size band, send measurements, or book a fitting visit before your Eight Two Five piece is cut.
fit.bannerDescription: Choose a standard band, send your measurements, or book a visit. Every piece is confirmed before it is cut.
fit.path1Body: Choose the closest band on the design page. The atelier still confirms the final fit before cutting.
fit.path2Body: Enter your bust, waist, hips, and desired length in centimetres when your band is not listed.
fit.path3Body: Choose a home visit when you want the measuring handled in person before the garment is made.
fit.measureYourselfTitle: Four numbers are enough to start.
fit.measureYourselfBody: Use a soft tape and measure in centimetres. The atelier reviews the numbers with you before cutting, so the form is a starting point, not a trap.
fit.measureBustBody: Measure around the fullest part, with the tape level and relaxed.
fit.measureWaistBody: Measure the natural waist, usually the narrowest point of the torso.
fit.measureHipsBody: Measure the fullest part of the hips, standing naturally.
fit.measureLengthBody: Measure from the shoulder or waist point to where you want the hem to sit.
fit.visitTitle: Want the tape handled for you?
fit.visitBody: Book a home visit, or arrange a fitting at {{location}}. The visit deposit is {{deposit}} and counts toward your garment.
fit.visitDepositBody: The deposit holds your slot and is credited to the final garment payment.
fit.timelineSelectBody: Pick a design and fit path.
fit.timelineConfirmBody: The atelier checks details before cutting.
fit.timelineCutBody: Your piece is made to order.

contact.docDescription: Talk to the Eight Two Five atelier — WhatsApp, email, or book a visit to be measured in person in Accra.
contact.bannerDescription: Questions about a design, your measurements, or a visit to be measured in person — WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach us.
contact.messageBody: Ask about fit, fabric, timing, or a specific design. WhatsApp is the quickest way into the atelier.
contact.fittingBody: Choose a home-visit slot when you want measurements handled in person before the garment is cut.
contact.intro: Questions about a design, your measurements, or a visit to be measured in person — WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach us.
contact.whatsappPending: The WhatsApp line opens with the storefront.
contact.visitPending: In-person measuring visits are by appointment — location coming soon.

slots.docDescription: Book a home or atelier fitting with Eight Two Five to be measured in person before your piece is cut.
slots.bannerDescription: Choose an open slot below. A GHS 500 deposit confirms your booking and counts toward your garment.
slots.emptyTitle: No visit slots are open right now.
slots.emptyBody: Fittings are added as the calendar opens up. Check back soon, or order online and add a custom size note instead.
slots.errorInvalidPhone: Enter a valid Ghana phone number, e.g. 024 123 4567.

waitlist.title: Be the first to know
waitlist.body: Join the list for new collection drops and restocks. No spam.

payment.bannerDescription: Thank you. We're confirming your payment now — you'll get an email as soon as your order is booked.
payment.noReference: If your payment went through, a confirmation email is on its way. Keep an eye on your inbox.
payment.reassurance: Confirmation can take a moment while we verify the payment with our provider. There's nothing more you need to do — we'll be in touch by email, and your order will appear in your account once it's booked.

account.title: Your account
account.ordersBlurb: Track payments, fittings, delivery notes, and production updates from one place.
account.loadError: Could not load your orders. Try again in a moment.
account.emptyBody: Orders will appear here once you place one. Browse the live collections to find your first piece.

orderDetail.loadError: Could not load this order. Try again in a moment.
orderDetail.deliveryPickup: Pickup — free, collect when your order is ready.
orderDetail.deliveryArranged: Dispatch to {{area}} — delivery arranged directly with Eight Two Five.
orderDetail.visitBody: Your home-visit slot will appear here once the calendar is live.
orderDetail.timeframeFallback: Roughly two weeks, depending on current bookings
orderDetail.emailNote: {{timeframe}}. We'll email you at each step.
orderDetail.notFoundBody: The reference may be mistyped, or the order belongs to a different account. Your orders are listed on your account page.

login.nameError: Enter your name so we know how to address you.
login.emailError: Enter a valid email address, like ama@example.com.
login.asideBody: Sign in with a link, view active orders, and keep every fitting note attached to the same account.
login.heading: Welcome back
login.intro: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link. No passwords to remember.
login.successBodyBefore: We sent a sign-in link to
login.successBodyAfter: . Open it on this device to continue.
login.submitError: Something went wrong on our end. Try again in a moment.
login.emailUnavailable: We couldn't send your sign-in link right now. Please try again in a moment.

verify.errorBodyBefore: Sign-in links only work once and expire quickly.

notFound.label: Error 404 — Page not found
notFound.heading: Lost thread.
notFound.body: The page you're after has been retired, or it never existed. Every thread leads back home.
notFound.caption: Return to the store

errorPage.label: Something went wrong
errorPage.heading: A loose thread.
errorPage.body404: The page you're after has been retired, or it never existed. Every thread leads back home.
errorPage.body: Something on our end came undone. Try again, or head back home — your place in the queue is safe.
errorPage.caption: Back to safety
